subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the comprehension of all contingent beings and the understanding of all created things, beseemeth the Lord of Names and Attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک ممکنات و عرفان کائنات مالک اسما و صفات را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
